label: 多路随机整数
description: 借用输入对象的 DataTree 形状（仅取 branch 拓扑/paths，忽略具体 value），对每个 branch 按 (基种子, 分支path) 做确定性哈希派生一个随机数，并映射到 [0, count) 的整数，输出一棵与输入完全同形状的整数树。典型用法：DataTree 多分支 fanout 时为每个分支（如每个地块）随机挑一个 [0,count) 的下标（如随机挑一种作物），各分支各异且可复现，无需改动下游电池。
description-en: Borrow the input object's DataTree shape (branch topology / paths only, values ignored) and emit a same-shaped DataTree<number> where each branch gets an integer in [0, count) derived deterministically from hash(baseSeed, branchPath). Typical use: pick a per-branch index in [0,count) on DataTree fanout (e.g. choose one crop per land parcel), distinct per branch and reproducible, with no change to downstream batteries.

inputs.name: shape
inputs.label: 形状
inputs.description: 任意对象的 DataTree；仅借用其形状（branch 拓扑/paths）来确定输出分支结构，忽略其具体 value。
inputs.description-en: Any object's DataTree; only its shape (branch topology / paths) is used to determine the output structure. Values are ignored.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 基种子
inputs.description: 全局基种子；0 表示用当前时间戳作为基种子（每次结果不同），非零值产生确定可复现的整数树。
inputs.description-en: Global base seed; 0 uses the current timestamp (different each run), any non-zero value yields a deterministic, reproducible integer tree.

inputs.name: count
inputs.label: 上界
inputs.description: 随机整数的上界（不含）；每个 branch 输出一个 [0, count) 的整数。count<=0 时兜底输出 0。
inputs.description-en: Exclusive upper bound; each branch outputs an integer in [0, count). Falls back to 0 when count <= 0.

outputs.name: value
outputs.label: 随机整数
outputs.description: 与输入 shape 同形状的整数树，每个 branch 一个各异且确定的 [0, count) 整数。
outputs.description-en: An integer tree with the same shape as the input, where each branch holds a distinct, deterministic integer in [0, count).
